document:
ATLAS DIRECT LENDING FUND IV, LP — Private Placement Memorandum (Excerpt)

Fund Manager: Atlas Capital Partners, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company. The Fund is managed by Atlas Capital Partners, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company headquartered in Greenwich, Connecticut.

Fund Strategy: The Fund will pursue a private credit strategy, focusing on senior secured direct loans to lower-middle-market US companies with EBITDA between $5M and $25M. Target deployment is 25-35 individual loans over a 3-year investment period.

Fund Vintage: The Fund commenced its initial closing on March 14, 2024 and is targeting a final closing by December 2024. Investment period begins at the initial closing.

Target Fund Size: $400 million USD, with a hard cap of $500 million.

Target Returns: The Fund targets a gross IRR of 13-15% and net IRR of 10-12% over the investment period.

Management Fee: The Fund will charge a management fee of 1.75% per annum on committed capital during the investment period, stepping down to 1.5% on invested capital thereafter.

Carried Interest: The General Partner is entitled to 20% of profits over an 8% preferred return (European-style waterfall). Notably, the carry calculation crystallizes on a deal-by-deal basis rather than the more conventional whole-fund basis, which may result in earlier distributions to the GP.

Lockup and Liquidity: Limited Partners commit capital for the duration of the Fund. The Fund has a 7-year term with two 1-year extensions at the GP's discretion. There is no early redemption right; LPs cannot withdraw capital prior to wind-down.

Key Person Provision: The Fund has a key person provision tied to the continued involvement of Mr. James Atlas, Managing Partner. Notably, Mr. Atlas is currently the subject of an unrelated SEC inquiry regarding a prior fund structure (matter under review, not adjudicated).

Fee Offsets: Transaction fees, monitoring fees, and break-up fees collected from portfolio companies will offset 100% of management fees, in line with industry best practice.

Track Record: Atlas Capital Partners has launched three prior direct lending funds (Funds I, II, III) with vintages 2017, 2020, and 2022 respectively. Combined deployed capital across the prior funds is $1.2 billion. Net IRR across the prior funds (since inception) is reported at 9.4%.
